rationale: Xi's confirmed arrival in Pyongyang is a materialised geopolitical event relevant to US Indo-Pacific strategy; the World Bank's Iran-war economic warning persists but without new escalation; the Toronto consulate shooting is a minor continuation.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's confirmed visit deepens the China-North Korea strategic partnership, directly challenging US Indo-Pacific posture and potentially affecting US military commitments.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: World Bank warning on US-Iran conflict economic fallout persists; relevant to US financial markets and consumer prices.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating attack on US consulate
top_events.summary: Ongoing investigation into US consulate attack in Toronto; no new escalation beyond prior cycle baseline.
